metadata.title: AI Red Teaming Benchmark Datasets
metadata.description: Curated index of published red teaming benchmark datasets from peer-reviewed research

datasets.name: RedBench
datasets.paper: RedBench: A Universal Dataset for Comprehensive Red Teaming of LLMs
datasets.highlights: Consolidates 37 existing datasets with standardized risk categorization

datasets.name: ALERT
datasets.paper: ALERT: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Assessing Large Language Models Safety through Red Teaming
datasets.highlights: Fine-grained safety taxonomy with both standard and adversarial prompts

datasets.name: HarmBench
datasets.paper: HarmBench: A Standardized Evaluation Framework for Automated Red Teaming and Robust Refusal
datasets.highlights: Standardized framework comparing 18 attack methods and 33 LLMs

datasets.name: AdvBench
datasets.paper: Universal and Transferable Adversarial Attacks on Aligned Language Models
datasets.highlights: Foundational GCG adversarial suffix attack benchmark

datasets.name: TrustLLM
datasets.paper: TrustLLM: Trustworthiness in Large Language Models

datasets.name: JailbreakBench
datasets.paper: JailbreakBench: An Open Robustness Benchmark for Jailbreaking Large Language Models
datasets.highlights: Standardized jailbreak evaluation with reproducible pipeline and leaderboard

datasets.name: SafetyBench
datasets.paper: SafetyBench: Evaluating the Safety of Large Language Models
datasets.highlights: Multilingual safety benchmark with 7 categories across English and Chinese

datasets.name: WildGuard
datasets.paper: WildGuard: Open One-Stop Moderation Tools for Safety Risks, Jailbreaks, and Refusals of LLMs
datasets.highlights: Large-scale moderation benchmark with 92K labeled examples

datasets.name: RobustBench
datasets.highlights: Standardized adversarial robustness leaderboard using AutoAttack

datasets.name: Red-Teaming Healthcare Dataset
datasets.highlights: Domain-specific red teaming by 80 multi-disciplinary healthcare experts
